author: wuyifan-code
description: Integrates Pretext library to reduce DOM measurement overhead in Obsidian's rendering pipeline, improving performance for large documents. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Pretext Optimizer

name: Pretext Optimizer

releases.author: wuyifan-code
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Align the manifest ID with the existing Obsidian community listing.
- Bundle Pretext through static module imports instead of injecting a runtime script element.
- Use CSS classes for settings statistics styling.
- Remove unsupported ESLint suppression directives.

## Verified

- Typecheck passes
- 63/63 tests pass
- Build output contains no runtime script injection
releases.name: Pretext Optimizer 1.2.2

releases.author: wuyifan-code
releases.description:
## Pretext Optimizer 1.2.1

P0 stability fixes + performance improvements over v1.2.0.

### Fixed

- **MutationObserver subtree: true -> subtree: false** — the v1.2.0 P2-1 fix was claimed but never actually applied. Heavy-element detection no longer walks the entire DOM on every keystroke.
- **ResizeObserver exception safety** — processingFlag is now reset in  inally, so a throw can no longer silently disable all future MutationObserver work.
- **manifest.minAppVersion** bumped from 1.4.0 to 1.10.0 to match the actual runtime requirement.
- **Font/width cache invalidation** — was permanent after first window resize; now debounced via equestAnimationFrame and re-armed next frame.
- **Settings panel telemetry** — Elements processed and Total processing time counters are now actually wired up (previously stuck at 0).

### Changed

- styles.css: 	ransition: min-height replaced with contain: layout on [data-pretext-optimized] — no more 100ms animation on heavy elements during open.
- Removed dead src/pretextEntry.ts.
- Build output: **120 KB**.

### Verified

- Typecheck clean
- 63/63 tests pass

### Install

After approval by the Obsidian team, install from Settings → Community plugins. For now use BRAT with wuyifan-code/Obsidian-pretext, or download main.js, styles.css, manifest.json below into .obsidian/plugins/pretext-optimizer/.

Full changelog: see [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/wuyifan-code/Obsidian-pretext/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
releases.name: Pretext Optimizer 1.2.1

releases.author: wuyifan-code
releases.description:
### 🚀 主要更新 🔧 关键 Bug 修复
- CodeMirror 全局依赖错误 - 修复了 h is not a constructor 错误
- Observer 反馈循环 - 添加处理标志防止 ResizeObserver 和 MutationObserver 相互触发
- Pretext 初始化竞争条件 - 使用轮询机制替代 setTimeout(0)
- ResizeObserver 逻辑错误 - 修复循环依赖问题 ⚡ 性能优化
- MutationObserver 扫描范围优化（ subtree: true → false ）
- LRU 缓存驱逐策略改进
- 新增 RegexCache 正则表达式缓存管理器 📦 代码质量改进
- 模块化重构：拆分 analysis.js 为多个专注模块
- 新增 Logger 统一日志和错误处理系统
- 完整的 TypeScript 类型定义
- 63 个单元测试 ，使用 Vitest 测试框架 📖 文档更新
- 更新 README.md，添加正确的 BRAT Beta 安装方法
- 更新技术架构说明
- 添加测试指南

releases.author: wuyifan-code
releases.description:
v1.1.0 版本说明 (Release Notes)
🚀 核心修复 (Bug Fixes)

修复插件初始化失败问题：解决了由于构建格式（esbuild bundle format）错误导致的 TypeError: h is not a constructor 异常。现在插件可以被 Obsidian 正确识别并加载。
兼容性增强：将构建输出格式调整为 CommonJS (CJS)，确保在 Obsidian 核心加载器环境下的稳定性。
🛠 优化与改进 (Improvements)

现代语法支持：将编译目标升级至 ES2018，提供更好的性能和更现代的运行环境。
体积优化：启用了 Tree Shaking，进一步精简产物代码体积。
扩展注册优化：增强了 CodeMirror 6 扩展注册的安全性检查，避免在某些极端情况下导致界面渲染中断。
📋 其它变动

更新了 manifest.json 中的版本号至 1.1.0。
同步了 build.js 的最新构建参数。
建议操作： 如果您使用 BRAT 插件，可以直接选择“Update”来获取最新版本。如果是手动安装，请确保将新的 main.js 文件覆盖至插件目录。
releases.name: Obsidian-pretext 1.1.0
